summary.zh: 第一章先建立最小闭环：用户输入进入 messages[]，模型决定要不要调工具，结果再回写到同一条循环里。
summary.en: The first chapter establishes the smallest closed loop: user input enters messages[], the model decides whether to call a tool, and the result flows back into the same loop.

detail.zh: 每轮都走一次调用模型 -> 处理输出 -> 再决定是否继续。
detail.en: Each turn calls the model, handles the output, then decides whether to continue.

detail.zh: 所有用户、助手和工具结果都累积在这里。
detail.en: User, assistant, and tool result history accumulates here.

detail.zh: 真正让 agent 能行动的是工具结果会回到下一轮推理。
detail.en: The agent becomes real when tool results return into the next reasoning step.

detail.zh: 最小可运行会话状态。
detail.en: The smallest runnable session state.

detail.zh: 模型本轮输出。
detail.en: The model output for the current turn.

handoff.en: User message enters messages[]

handoff.zh: 模型产出 tool_use 或文本
handoff.en: Model emits tool_use or text

handoff.zh: 工具结果回写到下一轮
handoff.en: Tool result writes back into the next turn

summary.zh: 这一章把“会调一个工具”升级成“能稳定路由很多工具”，主循环不变，工具层长出来。
summary.en: This chapter upgrades one tool call into a stable multi-tool routing layer while keeping the main loop unchanged.

detail.zh: 主循环继续只管模型调用与结果回写。
detail.en: The main loop still only owns model calls and write-back.

detail.zh: 把工具能力描述给模型看。
detail.en: Describes tool capabilities to the model.

detail.zh: 按工具名把调用路由到对应 handler。
detail.en: Routes a tool call to the correct handler by name.

detail.zh: 模型传入的结构化工具参数。
detail.en: Structured tool arguments emitted by the model.

detail.zh: schema + 描述。
detail.en: Schema plus description.

detail.zh: 工具名到函数的映射。
detail.en: Mapping from tool name to function.

handoff.en: The model selects a tool
The dispatch map resolves the handler
The handler returns a tool_result

summary.zh: 第三章把会话内的工作拆解显式化，agent 开始有一块自己的 session planning 状态。
summary.en: The third chapter makes session planning explicit so the agent gains a dedicated session-planning state.

detail.zh: 先把大目标拆成当前轮可追踪步骤，再去行动。
detail.en: Break the larger goal into trackable steps before acting.

detail.zh: 每轮重新看到当前 todo，避免中途漂移。
detail.en: Each turn revisits the current todo list to avoid drift.

detail.zh: 当前会话里的最小计划单位。
detail.en: The smallest planning unit inside one session.

detail.zh: 记录有哪些步骤、做到了哪一步。
detail.en: Tracks what steps exist and which one is active.

detail.zh: 会话级，不持久。
detail.en: Session-scoped, not durable.

handoff.en: The goal becomes steps first

handoff.zh: 当前步骤指导工具选择
handoff.en: The current step guides tool choice
Progress writes back into planning state

summary.zh: 这里开始把子任务从父上下文中隔离出来，系统第一次有了显式的多循环结构。
summary.en: This chapter isolates subtasks from the parent context and introduces the first explicit multi-loop structure.

detail.zh: 保持主线目标和最终整合责任。
detail.en: Keeps the main goal and the integration responsibility.

detail.zh: 为子任务提供一份干净上下文。
detail.en: Provides a clean context for the subtask.

detail.zh: 什么时候把工作交给子 agent，什么时候留在父循环。
detail.en: Defines when work is delegated versus kept in the parent loop.

detail.zh: 父 agent 的长期上下文。
detail.en: The parent agent's long-lived context.

detail.zh: 子任务一次性的独立上下文。
detail.en: An isolated one-shot context for the delegated subtask.

detail.zh: 做完摘要后就退出，不承担长期身份。
detail.en: Exits after returning a summary and does not keep long-lived identity.

detail.zh: 父循环交给子循环的边界对象。
detail.en: The boundary object handed from parent to child.

handoff.en: The parent loop defines a subtask

handoff.zh: 子循环在独立 messages 里执行
handoff.en: The child loop runs in isolated messages

handoff.zh: 摘要回到父循环继续主线
handoff.en: A summary returns to the parent loop

summary.zh: 技能系统把知识获取拆成发现层和按需加载层，避免把所有说明一开始全塞进 prompt。
summary.en: The skill system splits knowledge into a discovery layer and an on-demand loading layer so the prompt does not start bloated.

detail.zh: 先用便宜方式知道有哪些技能可用。
detail.en: Learns which skills exist through a cheap discovery pass.

detail.zh: 真正需要时再把深说明注入。
detail.en: Loads deep instructions only when they are actually needed.

detail.zh: 保存技能名字、简介和路径。
detail.en: Stores skill names, summaries, and paths.

detail.zh: 技能不是固定写进系统 prompt，而是按需补进当前轮。
detail.en: Skills are injected on demand instead of being permanently fused into the system prompt.

detail.zh: 技能的深说明载体。
detail.en: The deep instruction source for a skill.

handoff.en: Discover the skill entry first
Read SKILL.md when needed

handoff.zh: 再把结果回注给主循环
handoff.en: Feed the loaded result back into the main loop

summary.zh: 上下文压缩让系统第一次区分活跃窗口和被转移出去的细节，长会话开始变得可持续。
summary.en: Context compaction is where the system first separates the active window from offloaded detail so long sessions stay usable.

detail.zh: 接近 token 上限时决定何时压缩。
detail.en: Decides when to compact as the token budget grows.

detail.zh: 按损失程度分两层压缩。
detail.en: Compacts in layers with different levels of loss.

detail.zh: 当前轮必须直接看到的内容。
detail.en: What the current turn must see directly.

detail.zh: 被移出活跃窗口但仍可再读的细节。
detail.en: Detail moved out of the active window but still readable later.

detail.zh: 压缩后保留下来的主线。
detail.en: The retained storyline after compaction.

detail.zh: 短期挪走细节。
detail.en: Moves recent detail out of the hot window.

detail.zh: 保住主线连续性。
detail.en: Preserves continuity of the mainline.

handoff.en: Detail leaves the active window first
The mainline is preserved as a summary

handoff.zh: 后续真需要时再读回原文
handoff.en: Raw detail is read back only when needed

summary.zh: 从这一章开始，执行前出现了真正的控制面闸门：模型意图必须先变成可判断的权限请求。
summary.en: From this chapter onward, execution gets a real control-plane gate: model intent must become a permission request before it runs.

detail.zh: deny / ask / allow 决策发生在执行之前。
detail.en: deny / ask / allow happens before execution.

detail.zh: default、plan、auto 等模式影响整条权限路径。
detail.en: Modes such as default, plan, and auto affect the whole permission path.

detail.zh: 定义哪些工具或路径直接允许、拒绝或询问。
detail.en: Defines which tools or paths are allowed, denied, or sent for confirmation.

detail.zh: 把 allow / ask / deny 结构化回写。
detail.en: Writes allow / ask / deny back in structured form.

name.en: The Loop No Longer Reaches Tools Directly

detail.zh: tool call 先过权限层，再决定是否真正执行。
detail.en: A tool call passes through the permission layer before actual execution.

detail.zh: 把原始工具调用翻译成可判断对象。
detail.en: Translates raw tool calls into a policy-checkable object.

handoff.en: The model proposes an action

handoff.zh: 权限层做出 allow / ask / deny
handoff.en: The permission layer returns allow / ask / deny

handoff.zh: 结果回写给主循环继续推理
handoff.en: That result writes back into the main loop

summary.zh: Hook 让主循环第一次拥有稳定的旁路扩展点，日志、审计、追踪开始从核心逻辑中分离。
summary.en: Hooks give the loop stable sidecar extension points so logging, audit, and tracing separate from the core path.

detail.zh: 主循环在 pre_tool / post_tool / on_error 等边界发出事件。
detail.en: The loop emits events at boundaries like pre_tool, post_tool, and on_error.

detail.zh: 多个 hook 共享同一事件契约。
detail.en: Multiple hooks share one event contract.

detail.zh: tool、input、result、error 等结构化事件包。
detail.en: A structured event envelope carrying tool, input, result, error, and more.

detail.zh: 副作用通过 hook 附着，不侵入每个工具 handler。
detail.en: Side effects attach through hooks instead of invading every handler.

detail.zh: 一个具体副作用落点。
detail.en: A concrete side-effect sink.

handoff.en: The loop emits an event

handoff.zh: Hook 观察并产出副作用
handoff.en: Hooks observe and produce side effects

handoff.zh: 主线继续推进不被重写
handoff.en: The mainline continues without being rewritten

summary.zh: 长期记忆把跨会话事实从即时上下文里分层出来，系统第一次有了真正的 durable knowledge 容器。
summary.en: Long-term memory layers cross-session facts away from immediate context and introduces a real durable knowledge container.

detail.zh: 模型调用前读取，任务结束后提炼并写回。
detail.en: Load before the model call, then extract and write after the work turn.

detail.zh: 承载当前过程，不负责跨会话长期知识。
detail.en: Carries the live process, not long-term cross-session knowledge.

detail.zh: 只保存跨会话仍然有价值的事实。
detail.en: Stores only durable facts that still matter across sessions.

detail.zh: 用户偏好、项目约束等长期事实。
detail.en: Long-lived facts such as preferences and project constraints.

handoff.en: Relevant memory is loaded first
The main loop completes the current turn
New durable facts are extracted and written back

summary.zh: 系统输入在这里变成装配流水线，模型看到的不再是一段神秘大 prompt，而是一组有边界的输入片段。
summary.en: System input becomes an assembly pipeline here: the model no longer sees one giant mysterious prompt, but a bounded set of input sections.

detail.zh: 按顺序装配稳定规则、运行时状态、工具和记忆。
detail.en: Assembles stable policy, runtime state, tools, and memory in a visible order.

detail.zh: 每一段输入都有单独边界。
detail.en: Each input fragment has its own explicit boundary.

detail.zh: 工作目录、任务状态、记忆等运行时片段。
detail.en: Runtime fragments such as workspace state, task state, and memory.

detail.zh: 主循环在调用模型前先构建完整输入。
detail.en: The loop constructs the full input before calling the model.

detail.zh: 哪一段先拼、哪一段后拼。
detail.en: Which fragment is assembled first versus later.

handoff.en: Stable policy is assembled first
Runtime fragments are injected next
Only then does the final input reach the model

summary.zh: 错误恢复把失败正式纳入状态机，系统开始显式记录为什么继续、为什么重试、为什么停止。
summary.en: Error recovery formally brings failure into the state machine so the system records why it continues, retries, or stops.

detail.zh: 按失败类型选择 retry、fallback、ask 或 stop。
detail.en: Chooses retry, fallback, ask, or stop by failure type.

detail.zh: 把“为什么继续”写成可见状态。
detail.en: Makes the reason for continuation visible state.

detail.zh: 限制恢复分支不会无限循环。
detail.en: Prevents recovery branches from looping forever.

name.en: Failures Still Return to the Loop

detail.zh: 失败不是丢掉，而是带着恢复语义回写。
detail.en: Failures are not discarded; they write back with recovery semantics.

detail.zh: 错误分类和恢复分支状态。
detail.en: The error classification and branch state.

handoff.en: A tool failure is classified first
The recovery layer chooses a branch
The continuation reason returns to the main loop

summary.zh: 任务系统第一次把会话步骤提升成 durable work graph，系统开始能跨轮次推进一组真正的工作节点。
summary.en: The task system is where session steps become a durable work graph that can progress real work nodes across turns.

detail.zh: 完成一个任务后检查哪些后继节点可以开始。
detail.en: Checks which downstream nodes can start once one task completes.

detail.zh: 所有工作节点的持久记录面。
detail.en: The durable record surface for all work nodes.

detail.zh: blockedBy / blocks 记录谁依赖谁。
detail.en: blockedBy / blocks record who depends on whom.

name.en: Tasks Layer Away From the Session

detail.zh: 会话内的 todo 退到次要位置，durable task 进入主设计。
detail.en: Session-local todo becomes secondary while durable tasks enter the main architecture.

detail.zh: 目标、状态、依赖、owner 等持久字段。
detail.en: Durable fields for goal, status, dependencies, owner, and more.

handoff.en: A task node is created
Dependency edges decide when work becomes ready
Completion unlocks downstream nodes

summary.zh: 后台任务把“这项工作存在”和“这次执行正在跑”两层彻底分开，runtime record 正式成立。
summary.en: Background tasks fully separate the existence of work from one live execution attempt, which is where runtime records become first-class.

detail.zh: 下一轮调用模型前先把后台摘要带回。
detail.en: Drains background notifications before the next model call.

detail.zh: durable task 仍在任务板上。
detail.en: The durable task goal still lives on the task board.

detail.zh: 描述一条正在跑或跑完的执行槽位。
detail.en: Describes one running or completed execution slot.

detail.zh: 完整产物落盘，通知只带 preview。
detail.en: The full artifact goes to disk while notifications carry only a preview.

detail.zh: 慢命令在旁路执行，主循环继续前进。
detail.en: Slow commands execute on a side path while the main loop keeps moving.

detail.zh: 结果回流桥梁。
detail.en: The bridge back into the main loop.

handoff.en: The loop creates a runtime record
A background slot runs the slow command
notification plus output_file returns to the main system

summary.zh: Cron 调度把时间从“外部条件”变成系统内正式的触发源，但执行权仍然交给 runtime 层。
summary.en: The cron scheduler makes time a first-class trigger source while still handing execution off to the runtime layer.

detail.zh: 只负责判断规则是否命中。
detail.en: Only decides whether a rule matches.

detail.zh: 记录何时触发什么。
detail.en: Records what should trigger and when.

detail.zh: 命中后生成的具体执行实例。
detail.en: The concrete runtime instance created after a match.

detail.zh: cron tick 只是触发面，不直接执行业务。
detail.en: A cron tick is only a trigger surface, not the business execution itself.

detail.zh: 一次规则命中。
detail.en: One rule-match occurrence.

handoff.en: A cron rule matches
A runtime task is created
The background runtime takes over execution

summary.zh: 这里开始从单执行者迈向长期团队，persistent teammate、roster 和 inbox 成为新的平台骨架。
summary.en: This is where the system moves from one executor toward a long-lived team with persistent teammates, a roster, and inboxes.

detail.zh: 维护 roster、分配职责、观察团队状态。
detail.en: Maintains the roster, assigns work, and watches team state.

detail.zh: 记录每个队友的名字、角色和状态。
detail.en: Stores each teammate's name, role, and status.

detail.zh: 每个队友独立的消息边界。
detail.en: A separate message boundary for each teammate.

detail.zh: 长期存在、可反复接活的执行者。
detail.en: A long-lived worker that can take repeated assignments.

detail.zh: 长期身份，不是一次性委派结果。
detail.en: A long-lived identity, not a one-shot delegation result.

detail.zh: 邮箱里的结构化消息。
detail.en: A structured message carried through inboxes.

handoff.en: The lead defines responsibility
Messages enter the teammate inbox
The teammate runs independently and replies

summary.zh: 团队协议把协作从自由文本升级成结构化请求流，request_id 和 durable request record 成为新主线。
summary.en: Team protocols upgrade collaboration from free-form text into structured request flows centered on request_id and durable request records.

detail.zh: type、from、to、request_id、payload 这类固定外壳。
detail.en: A fixed envelope with type, from, to, request_id, and payload.

detail.zh: pending / approved / rejected / expired。
detail.en: pending / approved / rejected / expired.

detail.zh: 把协议请求变成 durable request record。
detail.en: Turns protocol requests into durable request records.

detail.zh: 审批、关机、交接这类协作都走同一种 request/response 模型。
detail.en: Approvals, shutdowns, and handoffs all use the same request/response model.

detail.zh: 协议工作的真正状态中心。
detail.en: The real state center of a protocol workflow.

handoff.en: A protocol request is sent
request_id binds the durable state record
An explicit response writes back into the state machine

summary.zh: 自治章节把队友从“等待派活”推进到“按 claim policy 自己找活并恢复上下文”，平台开始真正自己运转。
summary.en: The autonomy chapter moves teammates from waiting for assignments to self-claiming eligible work under a claim policy and resuming with context.

detail.zh: 空闲时按节奏检查 inbox 和 task board。
detail.en: Checks inboxes and the task board on a cadence during idle time.

detail.zh: 只有满足角色与状态条件的任务才允许 auto-claim。
detail.en: Only tasks that satisfy role and state conditions may be auto-claimed.

detail.zh: 记录是谁因什么来源认领了任务。
detail.en: Records who claimed a task and from which source.

detail.zh: 自治队友继续继承上一章的协议请求状态。
detail.en: Autonomous teammates still inherit durable protocol request state from the previous chapter.

detail.zh: 空闲时自己发现可做工作，再恢复执行。
detail.en: Discovers eligible work while idle, then resumes execution.

detail.zh: 判定任务是否可由当前角色认领。
detail.en: Decides whether the current role may claim a task.

handoff.en: The teammate enters idle polling

handoff.zh: claim policy 选出可认领工作
handoff.en: The claim policy selects eligible work

handoff.zh: 身份块重注入后恢复执行
handoff.en: Identity is re-injected and execution resumes

summary.zh: Worktree 章节把执行环境从主目录里拆开，任务继续表达目标，而 worktree 成为独立、可观察、可 closeout 的执行车道。
summary.en: The worktree chapter pulls execution environments out of the main directory: tasks still express goals while worktrees become isolated, observable, closeout-capable lanes.

detail.zh: 系统明确记录哪条任务用哪条执行车道。
detail.en: The system records which task is using which execution lane.

detail.zh: 收尾时显式决定 keep 还是 remove。
detail.en: Closeout explicitly decides whether to keep or remove the lane.

detail.zh: 注册每条隔离车道的路径、分支和 task_id。
detail.en: Registers each isolated lane's path, branch, and task_id.

detail.zh: 任务记录里也能直接看到它当前在哪条 lane 上。
detail.en: The task record shows which lane it is currently using.

detail.zh: create / enter / run / closeout 等生命周期事件。
detail.en: Lifecycle events such as create, enter, run, and closeout.

detail.zh: 不同任务默认不共享未提交改动。
detail.en: Different tasks do not share uncommitted changes by default.

detail.zh: 车道级执行记录。
detail.en: The execution record for one lane.

detail.zh: 保留或回收的显式结果。
detail.en: The explicit result of keep versus reclaim.

handoff.en: A task binds to a worktree lane

handoff.zh: 命令在隔离目录里执行
handoff.en: Commands run inside the isolated directory

handoff.zh: closeout 决定 lane 的最终去向
handoff.en: Closeout decides the lane's final fate

summary.zh: 最后一章把本地工具、插件和 MCP server 重新统一到同一 capability bus 下，外部能力终于回到原有控制面里。
summary.en: The final chapter reunifies native tools, plugins, and MCP servers on one capability bus so external capability returns to the same control plane.

detail.zh: 先发现能力，再决定本地、插件还是 MCP 路由。
detail.en: Discovers capability first, then routes to native, plugin, or MCP.

detail.zh: 外部能力和本地工具共用同一权限语义。
detail.en: External capabilities and native tools share one permission contract.

detail.zh: 远程结果也要转成主循环看得懂的标准 payload。
detail.en: Remote results are normalized into a payload the main loop already understands.

detail.zh: 告诉系统有哪些外部 server 可用。
detail.en: Tells the system which external servers are available.

detail.zh: 把 native / plugin / mcp 整理成一个可比较的能力面。
detail.en: Collects native, plugin, and MCP capability into one comparable view.

detail.zh: 本地 handler。
detail.en: A local handler.

detail.zh: 外部 server 或插件提供的远程能力。
detail.en: Remote capability provided by an external server or plugin.

detail.zh: 带 server / source / risk 信息的能力对象。
detail.en: A capability object carrying server, source, and risk information.

handoff.en: Capability discovery happens first
Routing and permission stay unified

handoff.zh: 标准化结果再回写主循环
handoff.en: A normalized result writes back into the main loop
